## Patch Summary
- What changed and why.

## File Manifest (every changed file + purpose)
- `path/to/file.ext` — purpose of this file change.

## QA Checklist (PASS / FAIL / NOT RUN)
- [ ] PASS — Deterministic CI (`npm run ci:validate`)
- [ ] PASS — Runtime checks (if run)
- [ ] NOT RUN — Explain anything intentionally skipped.

## Checklist IDs referenced
> Must reference IDs from `/docs/toa/TOA_Mega_Implementation_Checklist.md`.
- TOA-XXX:
- TOA-YYY:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Commands run (copy/paste)
```bash
# paste exact commands you ran
```

## QA Evidence
- Link artifacts, logs, screenshots, or note "N/A".

## Risks / Notes
- Known risks, trade-offs, and follow-ups.

## Continuation prompt for next session
- Paste the exact next-session handoff prompt.

## Required status checks plan
- Require `TOA CI / stable-ci` on `main` branch protection.
- Do **not** require `runtime-checks (manual)`; it is `workflow_dispatch` only.
